placeholderImages.description: Floral Pooja Thali - Hand-painted with intricate traditional motifs for auspicious occasions.
Handpainted Diya Set - Set of 6 colorful clay diyas perfect for festive evenings.
Custom Gift Hamper - A curated selection of handmade treasures in a traditional box.
Artisan Decorative Box - Handcrafted wooden box with metallic accents.
Traditional Wall Hanging - Vibrant textile art with mirror and bead work.
Silver Plated Pooja Plate - Premium silver-finished plate for religious ceremonies.
Lippan Mirror Art - Traditional Kutch mirror work on a modern circular canvas.
Ceramic Floor Vase - Elegant oversized floor vase with organic textures.
Macrame Wall Decor - Bohemian hand-knotted wall hanging for a cozy space.
Abstract Hand-painted Canvas - Modern art piece for contemporary living rooms.
Scented Candle Gift Set - Hand-poured soy wax candles in artistic ceramic jars.
Handwoven Cotton Cushions - Set of textured cushions for ethnic home styling.
Bridal Trunk Box - Velvet-lined luxury trunk for bridal ensembles.
Hand-embroidered Silk Envelopes - Premium Shagun envelopes for weddings.
Bespoke Wedding Invitation - Hand-designed wedding cards with gold foiling.
Bridal Floral Jewelry - Handcrafted gota-patti and floral jewelry for Haldi/Mehendi.
Luxury Wedding Potli - Silk potli bag with intricate Zardosi embroidery.
Customized Shubh Labh Hangings - Traditional door hangings for wedding decor.
